purpose: Create automatic awareness before puck action.
execution: Before each puck touch/rep, look left/right/behind and name what you saw.
appPrompt: What did you scan before touching the puck?
parentCue: Praise early scan even if puck skill is imperfect.

purpose: Make Maddox a centre who helps teammates.
execution: Use short commands: time, wheel, middle, reverse, I’m here, one more.
appPrompt: What did you say early today?
parentCue: Listen for useful early communication, not yelling.

execution: Review one scenario; identify support below puck, middle, weak side, escape option.
appPrompt: Where should you support when the puck is under pressure?

execution: Before receiving/carrying, name plan: carry, pass, shoot, protect, escape.
appPrompt: What was your plan before the puck arrived?
parentCue: Reward having a plan, not just perfect execution.

execution: After session/game, identify one time he attacked space or demanded puck.
appPrompt: How did you drive play today?
parentCue: Use specific praise: you attacked inside there.

execution: Use escape turn/backhand toe-drag; scan after escape; pass/shot next.
